scripts.db:init: cd infrastructure && uv run python scripts/create_table.py
scripts.db:seed: cd infrastructure && uv run python scripts/load_data.py
scripts.api:dev: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check backend infrastructure
scripts.format:py: uv run ruff format backend infrastructure && uv run ruff check --fix backend infrastructure
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm lint:py && pnpm typecheck:py && pnpm build && pnpm test
